derivation: Observed public DOM, style, geometry, event, and paint behavior from connected-component interaction corpora; no vendor source inspection.

nativeRequiredWptBaseline.note: The complete bounded required profile passes 106/106 documents and 423/423 assertions in both managed and native. The latest promotion adds the corrected Chrome-authorized overflow viewport contract: finite extents, saturation, queued and idempotent scroll events, ancestor hit-test clipping, and synchronous re-clamping after shrink and re-expansion. Chrome rejected the earlier formulation because a layout-taking vertical scrollbar induced horizontal overflow, an absolutely positioned tail legitimately preserved the old extent, and scroll events were asserted synchronously; only the corrected browser-valid bytes were promoted. Managed raster and native scene authority independently prove a proportional visible overlay thumb that moves with the bounded offset. The preceding typography promotion remains green, as does the complete 18-document/450-assertion ecosystem lane. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-managed-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-native-current-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-overflow-scroll-promoted-v1-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, OverflowViewportClipsHitTestingAndReclampsAfterExtentMutation, and test_native_overflow_scrolling_and_nowrap.

required: connected percentage inset and margin used values
font-relative size, padding, gap, and flex-basis computed values
content-box computed dimensions distinct from border-box geometry
synchronous padding and border geometry after CSSOM mutation
specified absolute computed dimensions retained under display:none
zero offset/client geometry for hidden subtrees
managed and native overlay scrollbar thumb paint
productEvidence: reported missing scrollbars and unbounded scrolling
coverage: native overflow clip and overlay scrollbar scene commands
capabilities.gap: Chrome and both adapters pass the corrected product-neutral DOM contract; managed raster and native scene authority separately prove proportional overlay-thumb paint and movement. The contract deliberately follows queued browser scroll events and changes the positioned descendant while shrinking content so unrelated overflow cannot preserve the old range. This bounded overlay policy does not yet claim scrollbar dragging, CSS Scrollbars Styling, ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo-elements, scroll snapping, smooth scrolling, overscroll behavior, nested scroll chaining, RTL scrollLeft models, or platform auto-hide timing. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-managed-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-native-current-v2-20260723/results.json, OverflowViewportClipsHitTestingAndReclampsAfterExtentMutation, and test_native_overflow_scrolling_and_nowrap.

The required exact-pixel contract passes both adapters for the four observed logical inline margin and padding longhands in the certified left-to-right projection. Direction-aware RTL mapping, vertical writing modes, logical shorthands, and block-axis logical properties are not claimed by this primitive. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-logical-inline-v1/{native,managed}/results.json.

required: auto block height from flex child
percentage height in an indefinite container
coverage: managed and native generated pseudo-element projection
capabilities.gap: Both product-neutral inline contracts now pass Chrome and both adapters without hosted component selectors. The market-status reduction uses a true inline child because Chrome correctly rejected the earlier inline-block trailing-whitespace formulation before promotion. The bounded claim covers generated inline advance, adjacent fragment placement, percentage-translate centering, and first-baseline alignment with a synthesized non-text baseline; it does not claim the complete CSS inline formatting context, every vertical-align value, bidi layout, or vertical writing modes. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-inline-loader-alignment-final-20260722/{managed,native}/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-managed-fixed-v3-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-native-current-v2-20260723/results.json.

The required contract and native engine regression cover the observed font:inherit/unset slice and pass across both adapters. Full CSS Fonts shorthand grammar, relative weight resolution, font matching/loading, variable fonts, feature settings, stretch, style, synthesis, and metric parity with Chrome remain outside this bounded claim.

required: computed family, size, weight and line height
host font matching by family stack and numeric weight
productEvidence: hosted component dialog and button labels
coverage: shared SkiaSharp.HarfBuzz layout and paint path
hosted component computed font-axis differential trace
capabilities.gap: Chrome, managed, and native pass all 8/8 assertions, and managed raster authority proves authored nowrap word spacing changes painted glyph placement as well as intrinsic geometry. Invisible collapsed DOM whitespace nodes remain explicit inline-layout participants in both direct and portable engines while staying absent from paint and hit testing. The required claim is bounded: exact cross-browser text raster parity, downloadable web fonts/Ahem, fallback across multiple faces in one run, word-spaced wrapping and RTL word-spacing paint, bidi ordering, vertical writing, variation axes, font-feature-settings, font-style/stretch/synthesis, optical sizing, hyphenation, selection/caret grapheme navigation, and Canvas TextMetrics actualBoundingBox fields remain open. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-managed-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-native-current-v1-20260723/results.json, and CssTextSpacingTests.

The current native required lane passes both dynamic absolute-positioning cases, both relative-positioning reftests, and the exact abspos-negative-margin raster. Connected STYLE activation now invalidates the pre-existing virtual root, so inherited font metrics reach hypothetical inline static positions. Broader block-in-inline fragmentation remains outside this bounded case. Evidence: artifacts/wpt-abspos-negative-v3/results.json.

The current native required lane passes scaleX, translate-zero, translate-negative, and transformed hit testing. Ordered mixed transform lists outside this pinned slice remain bounded by the product profile rather than claimed generally.

required: translate, scale, rotate, opacity and color interpolation
intermediate computed style, paint and client geometry
native staggered delay and infinite iteration
productEvidence: animated toolbar and dialog state changes
coverage: native host-clock transition and keyframe regressions
hosted component automatically discovered temporal checkpoints
capabilities.gap: Both adapters are required to pass the bounded transform/opacity/color transition slice, including events, cancellation, reversal and cadence. The managed cadence gate passes five consecutive serial runs, but a deliberately concurrent managed/native run recorded one 53ms host scheduling stall; competing-workload frame-loss percentiles and recovery therefore remain a reliability milestone rather than being hidden by a weaker threshold. Native additionally passes candidate opacity and rotate() CSS Animations contracts and generic discovery proves changing staggered-dot and spinner paint samples; those keyframe contracts remain candidate until managed implements the same slice. Other animated properties, directions, fill modes, play state, animation events, multiple-animation composition and the complete Web Animations API are not claimed. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-rotation-cadence-managed-serial-v1-20260723.

required: per-side border colors on a shared rounded curve
overflow clipping to the radius curve
productEvidence: volume settings Cancel and Ok buttons
capabilities.gap: The segmented-outline and spinner reductions distinguish open joined edges from colour-partitioned corners, while native scene regressions prevent computed-style-only passes and require exact open-edge centerline continuity. The upstream shorthand case is self-overlaid and the current Avalonia corner projection is scalar, so vertical elliptical paint is not claimed. No exact WPT combines border-radius shorthand with var()-substitution and additive calc(max()) used values; the isolated native/portable raster spike covers that composition.

The native ABI regression now proves that a zero simulated-command engine publishes an empty scene after its first resize and a hosted-component host can explicitly select that mode. The settled startup scenario proves the document subsequently becomes visible. A retained screenshot for every transient loading scene and a Chrome startup-sequence differential are still scheduled certification work.

required: SCRIPT raw-text tokenization prevents style-like text from entering the cascade
non-JavaScript SCRIPT data blocks remain inert DOM content
Window.name mutable own-property reflection and named-element precedence
input type hidden non-rendering and synchronous type-change geometry
candidate: Screen in top-level and iframe realms
productEvidence: public dark and light release pages
capabilities.gap: SCRIPT raw-text tokenization, inert SCRIPT data blocks, Window.name, and hidden-input rendering are required after direct Chrome and both adapters pass their neutral contracts and the originating unchanged jQuery paths pass. Native also loads both public release themes with zero script errors and passes the candidate detached-document, distinct live HTML/HEAD/BODY, Document.scrollingElement, bounded root viewport, Location, links-collection, script-cookie, CSSOM alias, resize-Event, and Window.screen regressions. The Screen reduction passes Chrome and both adapters and remains candidate until the current hosted component interaction run is green and the profile is promoted as one coherent milestone. Document.scrollingElement is presently the standards-mode documentElement projection used by this bounded host; quirks-mode BODY selection, HTMLCollection liveness/named properties, HTTP cookie ingress, domain/path/expiry/SameSite/Secure/HttpOnly enforcement, and the complete DOMImplementation, Location navigation, CSSStyleDeclaration enumeration/indexing, Event, and Screen orientation interfaces are not claimed.

required: connected source-less iframe synchronous initial about:blank
productEvidence: component libraries using hidden same-origin feature-probe frames
capabilities.gap: Chrome, managed, and native pass the bounded four-assertion contract, and the originating unchanged jQuery assertion passes both HtmlML adapters. This claim covers only the synchronous initial same-origin source-less document and plain document.write replacement. Navigated frames, src/srcdoc fetching, nested browsing-context history, sandboxing, origin transitions, cross-origin access control, frame load/error sequencing, parser-executed scripts and styles during document.write, frame teardown under navigation, and arbitrary iframe rendering remain outside this bounded promotion.

required: generic Node and Element prototype dispatch
variadic DOMTokenList add/remove with reflected class-attribute presence
live DOMTokenList class reflection and method shadowing
dispatched Event identity and arbitrary expando/accessor retention
IntersectionObserver options and bounded scroll-root transitions
scrolled descendant client geometry with scroll-invariant offset geometry
programmatic nested click bubbling with Event prototype methods
CSS.escape serialization and escaped-ID selector round-trip
Node isSameNode identity and bounded isEqualNode structural equality
Web IDL DOMString lone-surrogate preservation through ID attributes and selector matching
MouseEvent constructor, inheritance, init defaults, identity-preserving dispatch, and post-dispatch cleanup
nextElementSibling and previousElementSibling across whitespace nodes
documentElement activation through delegated Document and Window listeners
synchronous reentrant programmatic click dispatch and composed paths
variadic ParentNode.append with string conversion, node moves, and DocumentFragment flattening
Attr and Comment factories plus detached XML Document construction
XML case-sensitive and HTML ASCII-folded attribute reflection
input defaultValue, maxLength, tabIndex, checked and readOnly reflection
progress and meter numeric value IDL
default, exclusive and explicit-empty option selectedness
form reset for single and multiple selects
document named-form properties, nodeName and label htmlFor
Web IDL boolean conversion for checked and selected
productEvidence: jQuery 4.0.0 selectors, events, deep clone, multiple-select and repeated-field serialization plus all 51 unchanged callbacks, 65 selected unchanged attributes, and 55 selected unchanged CSS cases

Bootstrap 5.3.8 tab, collapse, dropdown/Popper, modal, tooltip, popover, offcanvas, ScrollSpy, carousel, and all 43 unchanged Collapse, 47 unchanged Tab, 31 unchanged Toast, plus 87 unchanged Dropdown cases
React DOM 19.2.8 createRoot, hydration reuse, reconciliation, controlled input, portal, transition, Suspense and unmount fixture
capabilities.gap: The expanded ecosystem matrix contains 18 documents and 450 assertions, all passing in Chrome, managed, and native. Its unchanged official-source slice is 253 Bootstrap 5.3.8 cases and 171 jQuery 4.0.0 cases from callbacks, attributes, and CSS, plus 26 composition assertions. The detached computed-style lifecycle, initial iframe-document, and font-relative box reductions close the final managed failures without weakening the required profile. SCRIPT raw-text tokenization, selector API SyntaxError semantics, Window.name, hidden-input rendering, Grid placement CSSOM, auto-margin CSSOM/used-value expansion, custom-property CSSOM/token/lifecycle behavior, box-edge CSSOM/geometry, hidden-subtree dimensions, z-index connection lifecycle, computed named-property semantics, detach/reattach snapshot lifecycle, initial same-origin iframe identity/document.write lifecycle, and bounded font-relative inset/size/unit conversion close their originating unchanged failures through neutral required contracts and pinned WPT where available. The manifest exposes complete file inventories for Bootstrap (14), jQuery QUnit (24), and React DOM Jest (128), with unselected files explicitly classified. Complete HTMLCollection liveness/named access, the full form submission algorithm, EventTarget options and AbortSignal, invalid DOMTokenList-token exceptions, Web IDL conversions beyond the certified paths, all Node members and node types, zoomed root geometry, complete IntersectionObserver edge behavior, complete DOMParser/XML/error semantics, live NamedNodeMap identity, further DOM/CSS-heavy jQuery files, the first expanded unchanged React DOM selection, and the remaining framework suites remain future inventory items.

required: supported CSS IDL properties remain distinct from JavaScript expandos
invalid declaration assignment preserves the previous authored value
empty-string assignment removes the declaration while preserving the style attribute
disconnected computed style is empty while inline authored declarations remain readable
empty custom properties excluded from named-property lookup
computed supported camel-case and kebab-case aliases
detached computed style does not survive reattachment
stylesheet recascade and box suppression after reattachment
padding shorthand retention and physical longhand override
border shorthand, width expansion, style composition, and physical-side override
content-box computed width and height distinct from border-box geometry
padding declaration removal and synchronous layout invalidation
flex-basis inline retention through connection and recascade
productEvidence: jQuery 4.0.0 CSS feature detection and detached element construction
future CSS-in-JS and component-library declaration probes
capabilities.gap: Chrome, managed, and native pass the declaration-validity, custom-property CSSOM/lifecycle, padding/border box-edge, hidden-subtree dimension, z-index assignment/connection, computed named-property, detached snapshot lifecycle, and font-relative box contracts; both HtmlML adapters also pass all 73/73 assertions in the unchanged pinned CSS Variables WPT. The enlarged required profile passes 104/104 documents and 414/414 assertions after the independent inline generated-content and baseline promotion. The box-edge, z-index, named-property, reattachment, and font-relative claims are deliberately bounded to the exercised shorthand, physical-side, content-box, geometry, integer/pixel serialization, inline precedence, connection, removal, supported/unsupported/custom access, connectivity transitions, and inherited-font mutation; complete border and stacking-context grammars or CSSStyleDeclaration enumeration are not implied. getPropertyPriority/setProperty priority argument coverage, registered custom properties, CSS Typed OM, complete grammar validation, and the remaining composed computed/used-value geometry are not claimed.

required: custom-property inheritance, case-sensitive cascade, overwrite, importance and CSS-token preservation
connected STYLE insertion, text mutation, removal, reinsertion, and detached-to-connected activation
display:none client-rectangle suppression and visibility:hidden layout retention
default inline, inline-block, block, and list-item display
ancestor-hidden offset and client geometry suppression
candidate: root inheritance and initial values on distinct HTML/BODY roots
capabilities.gap: The expanded upstream CSS lane passes 8/11 documents and 19/25 assertions in managed, and now passes 11/11 documents and 25/25 assertions in native. Native keeps the live HTML and BODY roots distinct, resolves root inherit to the property initial values, serializes an unspecified z-index as auto, and passes all selected CSSOM, Custom Properties, and unset documents; the separate required all:unset control-reset contract passes 2/2 through both adapters. Root inheritance remains candidate because the unchanged upstream case is still 0/4 in the managed adapter. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-candidate-root-model-v3-20260722/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-root-inherit-both-v1-20260722/{native,managed}/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-all-unset-{native-v2,managed-v4}/results.json.

required: currentColor inheritance into backgrounds and borders
physical border-side width and color override
border-box geometry after inline CSSOM mutation
capabilities.gap: The current native required lane passes all three exact color reftests: #RRGGBBAA, currentColor background, and currentColor border. Chrome and both adapters also pass the bounded four-assertion border CSSOM/geometry contract. Complete border style grammar, logical-side mapping, border images, and broader CSS Color syntax remain outside this bounded component profile.

The candidate exact-pixel primitive passes natively after element opacity was moved from per-command alpha multiplication to explicit isolated scene groups. Managed Avalonia 11 still distributes visual opacity across subtree draw operations. Native groups that span the retained-canvas background/foreground split are not yet claimed by this DOM-box primitive. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-opacity-native-v3/results.json and artifacts/web-platform-subset-all-v27-20260722/results.json.

Native passes the two-assertion primitive contract and independently publishes the loaded SVG at the asserted scene coordinates; stylesheet-relative URLs resolve against the stylesheet address and SVGs with either an explicit viewBox or positive numeric width/height supply an intrinsic viewport. This remains candidate because the managed adapter does not yet retain or paint background-image longhands. Multiple layers, repeating tiles, gradients, binary image resource envelopes, background-origin/clip/attachment, and SVGs with neither viewBox nor numeric intrinsic dimensions remain outside the bounded claim.

required: presentation attributes below author rules in the cascade
currentColor resolution against the painted element
scene invalidation after inherited color and class changes
productEvidence: axis-scale Labels and Lines submenu chevrons
coverage: V8 Volume-more and axis-scale native scene/color/hit gates
capabilities.gap: The required exact-pixel primitive passes both adapters for literal and CSS-authored fill/stroke, author override of black presentation attributes, inherited HTML color, currentColor resolution, and native SVG rasterization. The broader SVG presentation-property surface, paint servers, context-fill/context-stroke, and SVG-root XML harness remain outside this retained icon slice. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-svg-chevron-v3/{native,managed}/results.json.

Native now passes the unchanged exact in-flow, flex, and positioned generated-content reftests plus the required exact-pixel positioned/rounded/stacked pseudo primitive in both adapters. WPT visibility-layout-001.xht remains a self-verifying visual test that does not compose visibility with generated content; the inherited-hidden generated-content composition remains covered by the focused native/portable spike. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-pseudo-positioned-v3/{native,managed}/results.json, artifacts/wpt-generated-regression-v2/results.json, and artifacts/wpt-flex-pseudo-regression-v2/results.json.

The current native required lane passes li-value-reversed, list-and-flex, and the exact list-style-position-023 inside-marker reftest. Outside marker placement and the broader marker/counter surface remain outside this bounded slice. The nearest CSS2 inside-marker wrapping case is still self-verifying without a machine-readable oracle. Evidence: artifacts/wpt-list-marker-v2/results.json.

required: constrained overflow shrink with footer containment
coverage: CSS Flexbox 1 section 9.7 Resolving Flexible Lengths
capabilities.gap: Both adapters pass the exact flexbox-with-pseudo-elements reftest and the promoted upstream horizontal flex-wrap reftest. The latter proves line collection before flexible-length resolution, per-line shrink, default wrapped-line cross-axis stretch, oversized flex:none overflow, margin-constrained shrink, single-authority block margins, and the bounded consecutive left-float reference construction. Broader float formatting (text intrusion, clear, shape-outside, RTL and arbitrary mixed flow) is not claimed, and the dynamic check-layout flex test remains harness-blocked. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-required-flex-float-matrix-v1-20260722/.

Both adapters pass the required fixed-track/gutter reftest and the six-assertion product-neutral Grid placement CSSOM contract. The latter preserves source-order cascade, unitless integer lines, one- and four-component shorthands, and removal to auto, closing the originating unchanged jQuery assertion. Named lines, span grammar beyond retained tokens, fractional/minmax track sizing, dense placement, area templates, and the broader Grid specification remain outside this bounded claim.

required: anonymous cell wrappers for improper children
capabilities.gap: The current native required lane passes the fractional table-cell reftest, fixed-layout excess-width assertions, and all table-model-fixup subtests. WPT css/css-tables/bounding-box-computation-1.html remains outside the claim because its assertions also require border-spacing and column/column-group box geometry. Colspan/rowspan and border conflict resolution remain outside this MVP slice.

productEvidence: Volume Settings selected and unselected radios
capabilities.gap: The unchanged upstream checked-state WPT is required and passes all three assertions in native and forced-portable lanes. Product-shaped native geometry/raster/event/hit gates and operated actions cover transparent overlays and styled-label activation. Broader form validation, submission, and complete select/option UI behavior remain outside this slice.

The required submenu primitive passes both adapters through bounded testdriver pointer move/click support. Touch and pen pointer types, multi-pointer capture, pressure/tilt, and complete WebDriver action sequences remain outside this mouse-pointer slice. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-submenu-lifecycle-v3/{native,managed}/results.json.

The required WPT contract passes both adapters and the native ABI regression proves host cursor, URLSearchParams.append serialization, window.open, and external-navigation semantics without launching a real browser. The product-neutral scenario verifies an example.com handoff with no hosted-document replacement. Only absolute/resolved HTTP(S) URLs are handed off; arbitrary schemes, downloads, target browsing contexts, referrer policy, complete popup APIs, and in-document navigation remain outside this safety boundary. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-cursor-external-v2/{native,managed}/results.json.

The product-neutral contract passes managed and native lanes for every Canvas operation currently observed in the hosted-component corpus. The certified measureText slice is finite non-negative width only; full TextMetrics and pixel-perfect canvas/Chrome comparison remain separate coverage work.

The contract covers the exact media-query slice observed in the hosted-component corpus. Change events, print media, resolution, color-gamut, forced-colors, and the broader Media Queries specifications remain outside this claim.

required: type, class, ID, universal, and attribute selectors
descendant, child, adjacent, and general sibling combinators
root, first-child, last-child, empty, and element-bounded scope
compound selector continuation after functional :not() pseudos
DOM selector APIs throw DOMException SyntaxError for malformed and unsupported selectors
capabilities.gap: The required contracts and pinned upstream WPT cover selector families observed in the hosted-component corpus and the scope/escape paths exposed by Bootstrap Collapse. Native uses a lossless WTF-8 DOMString representation, and the complete 68-case selector-escape WPT passes both adapters. The required DOM selector error contract maps directly to WPT dom/nodes/selectors.js and closes the silent-unknown-pseudo behavior that broke jQuery feature detection, including borrowed prototype-method dispatch. Full Selectors Level 4 syntax, shadow trees, namespaces, and complete dynamic invalidation remain outside this claim.

required: currentTarget and eventPhase reset after dispatch
